calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order; Memorandum Of Points And Authoritied In Support.
Off Calendar Feb-05-2015 Off Calendar

Motion To Consolidate Cases Pes-14-298241 And Cgc-14-541190
Off Calendar Feb-05-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Wallace Doolittle for and with (special administrator) Nina Mackenzie. John Hartog & Kenneth Katzoff for (movants) David Baker, et al.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to whether or not the civil case should be barred, whether the matter should remain in civil jurisdiction or probate jurisdiction, which case should be lead if consolidated (civil or probate), etc. The motion to consolidate cases was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago. (Not Reported)
